name: Lemon-Sesame Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces fresh asparagus spears or 1 (8 oz.) package frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the fresh asparagus.
2. Cook, covered, in boiling salted water for 10 to 15 minutes, or until crisp-tender.
3. Meanwhile, heat and stir butter and sesame seed in a saucepan over low heat for about 5 minutes, or until seeds are golden brown.
4. Add lemon juice and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
5. Drain the asparagus and remove it to a heated serving dish.
6. Pour the lemon mixture over the hot asparagus.
7. Serve immediately. Serves 4. Contains 56 calories per serving.
